# Riverside Auto Rental

> Family-owned car rental business in Black River Falls, Wisconsin, established in 1983. Located at N5856 WI-54, Black River Falls, WI 54615. Phone: 715-670-0209. We offer daily, weekly, long-term, and insurance replacement vehicle rentals.

## Fleet

- Intermediate Car: $55/day local (100 mi limit), $75/day unlimited, $315/week unlimited
- Full-Size Car: $65/day local (100 mi limit), $85/day unlimited, $350/week unlimited
- 7 Passenger Minivan: $78/day + $0.10/mile, $400/week unlimited
- 15 Passenger Van: $135/day + $0.10/mile, $700/week unlimited
- All weekly rentals (7+ days) include unlimited mileage

## Services

- Daily and weekly car rentals
- Insurance replacement vehicle rentals (work directly with adjusters and body shops)
- Long-term vehicle rentals (custom quoted)
- 15-passenger van rental for groups, sports teams, church groups, family reunions, and weddings

## Rental Requirements

- Valid U.S. driver's license
- Major credit card or bank-issued debit card linked to checking account
- Proof of auto insurance with policy number and expiration date

## Hours

- Monday–Friday: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM
- Saturday: 8:00 AM – 12:00 PM (noon)
- Sunday: Closed / By Appointment Only

## Location

- Address: N5856 WI-54, Black River Falls, WI 54615
- On Highway 54, easily accessible from I-94
- Shares location with Riverside Auto Sales (separate business, separate tax ID)
- Serving Black River Falls, Jackson County, and western Wisconsin

## Contact

- Phone: 715-670-0209
- Email: contact@riversideautorental.com
- Website: https://riversideautorental.com
